word: H5899 - עִיר הַתְּמָרִים - ʻÎyr hat-Tᵉmârîym - eer hat-tem-aw-reem' - The city of palmtrees

sections.paragraph:
Original: עיר התּמרים

Transliteration: ‛ı̂yr hattemârı̂ym

Phonetic: eer hat-tem-aw-reem'

BDB Definition:

Ir-hatmarim = "the city of palmtrees"
  1. another name for 'Jericho'

Origin: from H5892 and the pl. of H8558 with the article interpolated

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
